name: Lizzies Bar Enhanced ( with Apartment )
description: Lizzies Bar is by far one of the Coolest Bars to Visit in Night City and the numbers show ! Lizzie has been given a huge sum of eddies from a “PriVate” Investor, and she’s dumped it straight into the Club ! An Expanded Front Parking Lot, New Neon Decals, your own Place, and even Restoring the Good Ole Basketball Court !
